suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-06-19 False positive: CVE-2025-21199 applies to Microsoft Azure Agent and Site Recovery. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - applicationinsights-core 3.7.8 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-19 False positive: CVE-2026-33117 applies to Microsoft Azure SDK for Java. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - azure-core 1.58.1 - azure-core-amqp 2.12.0 - azure-core-http-netty 1.16.4 - azure-json 1.5.1 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-19 False positive: CVE-2025-7962 applies to angus-activation. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - angus-activation 2.0.3 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-19 False positive: CVE-2022-26336 and CVE-2025-31672 apply to apache poi libraries. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - poi 4.1.2 - poi-ooxml 4.1.2 - poi-ooxml-schemas 4.1.2 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-07-06 False positive: CVE-2026-54515 applies to jackson libraries. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - jackson-databind 2.22.0 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-07-07 False positive: CVE-2026-54399 and CVE-2026-54428 applies to httpcore libraries. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - httpcore 4.4.16 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-07-23 False positive: CVE-2026-44891, CVE-2026-55831 and CVE-2026-55833 applies to netty libraries. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - netty 4.2.16 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.
